title: Hestiv
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Hestiv |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Imperial Remnant]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] **[[Ubiqtorate]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|At least that way we'd go down fighting. Your way… there's no honor in surrender, Admiral.|High General Hestiv to Admiral Pellaeon|''[[Specter of the Past]]''}} '''Hestiv''' was a [[High General]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]], in command of the Imperial forces of [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] at the time of the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] and the attempted coup of the Imperial Remnant by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra]], [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guardsman]] [[Grodin Tierce]], and the con-artist [[Flim (Human)|Flim]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. ==Biography== Loyal to then-[[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], he reluctantly agreed that the only possible way the Empire could survive would be to sign a [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|treaty of peace]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In the last days of the Caamas Document Crisis and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he agreed to allow the New Republic's expert slicer [[Zakarisz Ghent]] search the databank files of the [[Ubiqtorate/Legends|Ubiqtorate]] base at [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] for an original copy of the [[Caamas Document]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|A pity the Emperor didn't work harder at that kind of public relations himself twenty years ago.''"
"''A pity someone who wasn't so insanely blind with power didn't overthrow him while there was still time. There must have been hundreds of competent administrators or Fleet officers who could have kept the Empire alive.|Admiral Pellaeon and [[General/Legends|General]] Hestiv|}} Hestiv was a competent and loyal [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]]. On relative good terms with the native [[Yaga (species)|Yagai]], he disagreed with [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] brutal and intolerent politics. He also bitterly regretted not to have served under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Hestiv }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army generals of the Imperial Remnant]] [[Category:Males]]
